code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    macd = ta.trend.MACD(df['close'], fast=params['fast'], slow=params['slow'], signal=params['signal'])
    macd_diff = macd.macd_diff()
    signals = np.where(macd_diff > params['upper_thresh'], -1, np.where(macd_diff < params['lower_thresh'], 1, 0))
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: NZD/USD exhibits mean reversion tendencies when MACD divergence exceeds dynamic thresholds, capturing overextended moves before reversion to the mean.
